name: pipeline-skill-invoker
description: Invoke AI skills from CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Models API or Copilot CLI. Automate DevOps tasks with AI-powered validation, generation, and analysis in GitHub Actions and Azure DevOps.
author: DevOps Agent Skills Team
prerequisites: GitHub account with access to GitHub Models or Copilot
GitHub Personal Access Token with models:read scope
Familiarity with REST APIs or CLI tools
